name: Emberplague Rat
tips: Emberplague Rat has 0 attack but burns all adjacent enemies at end of turn. Position it next to enemy minions to apply constant burn damage without attacking.
At 24 health for 2 mana, it's extremely tanky for its cost. It can soak hits while its burn whittles down neighbours.
Place it in a central lane to potentially burn enemies in adjacent columns. Burn stacks mean sustained damage over multiple turns.
Pair with Pyre Archer for a fire-heavy strategy — Emberplague burns at end of turn while Pyre Archer burns on attack from range.
As a Rat, it's still a valid promote target for Giant Rat's death trigger. A 24-health Rat is harder to kill than a Common Rat, keeping your promote chain alive.
rulings: The passive burn applies to adjacent enemy minions. It does not burn your own minions.
Burn is a boolean — adjacent enemies become burning, they don't accumulate stacks from repeated passes.
Moving Emberplague Rat changes which enemies it burns. An enemy that's no longer adjacent still has is_burning=true from previous ticks, but won't be re-targeted.
With an allied Flame Wyrm, the burns you apply tick for 6 🤍 on enemy turn starts.
